meta.title: Whale Land ??An idea company for playful services
meta.description: Whale Land creates playful services that make the world more varied, useful, and happy.

common.externalNotice: You are entering an independent service site.
common.footerLine: Fun ideas, useful services, happier moments.
common.copyright: 짤 2026 Whale Land. All rights reserved.

home.introTitle: We use playful ideas to make the world a little more varied and happy.
home.introBody:
Whale Land builds services that add small sparks of fun to everyday life and travel.
We mix technology, stories, characters, and physical experiences freely.
The services you see now are not a fixed lineup, but the current shape of an evolving company.
home.serviceListTitle: Whale Land services you can meet now
home.serviceListBody: Each service is an independent project with its own world and purpose. New services can be added to this hub as Whale Land evolves.
home.contactTitle: We welcome proposals, partnerships, and questions.
home.contactBody: For service use, partnerships, production, or business inquiries, contact us below. You can copy the email address with one button.

korean-birth-type.title: Korean Birth Type
korean-birth-type.cardTitle: Test yourself through Korean-style saju reading.
korean-birth-type.summary: Do you really know yourself? Test yourself through Korean-style saju reading. You may discover hints about your real love and luck.
korean-birth-type.homeDescription: Test yourself through Korean-style saju reading. You may discover hints about your real love and luck.
korean-birth-type.heroTitle: Test yourself through Korean-style saju reading.
korean-birth-type.heroLead: Korean Birth Type turns saju into a playful self-understanding experience, not a heavy prediction.
korean-birth-type.visualCaption: A playful self-reading system inspired by Korean saju.
korean-birth-type.statementEyebrow: A DIFFERENT WAY TO READ YOURSELF
korean-birth-type.statementTitle: Lighter than a prophecy, deeper than a quiz.
korean-birth-type.statementBody: It starts from your birth date and time, but it does not define your future. It turns day pillars, five elements, relationships, and luck into cards that help you look at yourself in a new way.
korean-birth-type.featuresTitle: A card-based way to read yourself

features.title: Korean-style reading
features.body: Saju structures are translated into modern language and card experiences.

features.title: Hints on love and luck
features.body: Relationships, tendencies, and rhythms are shown in a light but memorable way.

features.title: Mobile saving
features.body: Read the result like cards, save what stays with you, and revisit it later.

steps.title: Enter birth data
steps.body: Add the basic information needed for the reading.

steps.title: Card reading
steps.body: The saju-based interpretation unfolds as cards.

steps.title: Check results
steps.body: Save memorable parts and return to them later.

korean-birth-type.closingBody: Even if you think you know yourself well, it may give you a new clue.

haedurio.title: Haedurio
haedurio.summary: Having trouble in Korea? Use Haedurio, the fixer service that helps solve almost anything.
haedurio.homeDescription: Use Haedurio, the fixer service that helps solve almost anything. We help stuck travel moments move again.
haedurio.heroTitle: When your trip gets stuck, Haedurio helps.
haedurio.heroLead: Haedurio helps travelers in Korea organize problems such as reservations, purchases, delivery, and lost items, then find the next practical step.
haedurio.visualCaption: Local help for the moments that interrupt your trip.
haedurio.statementTitle: Shorten the trouble. Keep the trip going.
haedurio.statementBody: In an unfamiliar language and place, small issues can stop the whole trip. Haedurio organizes the situation, checks possible options, and helps travelers decide what to do next.
haedurio.featuresTitle: From problem description to next step

features.title: Situation sorting
features.body: We help organize complicated situations from the necessary information first.

features.title: Local context
features.body: We check possible options based on Korea's reservation, purchase, and delivery environment.

features.title: Next-step guidance
features.body: We help you understand what to do next beyond simple translation.

haedurio.processTitle: From the moment a problem appears to the moment your trip moves again.

steps.title: Check paths
steps.body: We check possible methods and needed steps.

steps.title: Move forward
steps.body: Continue with the option that fits your situation.

haedurio.closingBody: When something gets stuck, tell Haedurio what happened.

covert.title: Beomi Stamp Tour
covert.summary: No more ordinary travel! It is time for infiltration-action tourism. Mission CLEAR with Beomi!
covert.homeDescription: It is time for infiltration-action tourism. Move through Seoul with Beomi, collect stamps, and Mission CLEAR!
covert.heroLead: Beomi Stamp Tour turns Seoul locations into operation zones. Travelers carry a mission booklet, explore the city, and complete records like field agents.
covert.visualCaption: A field mission hidden inside an ordinary city trip.
covert.statementTitle: From seeing tourist spots to clearing missions.
covert.statementBody: The trip does not end with simply seeing famous places. Open the mission booklet, visit operation zones, collect stamps and field notes, and Seoul becomes one secret mission.
covert.featuresTitle: A secret operation you can hold

features.title: Passport-style booklet
features.body: A physical booklet with briefings, location info, and recording space.

features.title: Seoul operation zones
features.body: Explore tradition, shopping, food, night views, and local neighborhoods as missions.

features.title: With Beomi
features.body: Collect stamps and clear missions with cute agent Beomi.

covert.processTitle: Receive the briefing, move to the field, and leave records.

steps.title: Receive briefing
steps.body: Check operation zones and directives in the mission booklet.

steps.title: Field operation
steps.body: Move through the city and collect stamps and field records.

steps.title: Mission CLEAR
steps.body: Fill the booklet and complete your own Seoul operation.

covert.closingTitle: Seoul is already an operation zone.
covert.closingBody: Turn ordinary travel into a mission with Beomi.
